name: Hyperstack
description: GPU cloud platform with instant H100/A100 access for AI and ML training, fine-tuning and inference workloads.

seo.title: Hyperstack — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Hyperstack: GPU cloud platform with instant H100/A100 access for AI and ML training, fine-tuning and inference workloads.

when_to_use: Renting high-performance GPUs for LLM training on demand
Running distributed fine-tuning jobs on H100 GPU clusters
Spinning up inference infrastructure for hosted model serving
Cost-optimizing GPU compute for ML teams vs hyperscalers

pros: On-demand H100/A100 at competitive hourly rates
cons: Smaller ecosystem than AWS/GCP for ML tools
Capacity can tighten during peak demand
review.verdict: A solid cost-effective GPU cloud if you don't need the full hyperscaler toolbox.
review.best_for: AI startups and labs running training or inference without AWS lock-in
review.not_for: Enterprises needing deep integration with AWS/GCP/Azure services

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
